case_title: UNITED FINANCIAL CASUAALTY COMPANY VS. LA MONTE JOHNSON ET AL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Lawrence Lockwood, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed with prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
